text:
今度の特訓場所は砂漠だ。
足場が悪く、狭い場所も多い。
環境はあまり良くないだろう。

高さがあったり、岩が出ていたりと
動きづらい場所も多い。
当然、戦いにくさもあるだろう。

思うように動けない場所だからこそ
特訓のしがいもあるというものだ。

This time, we will train in the Desert.
The footing is poor and there are
many confined areas. Not the best
of environments, I must say.

Some areas are elevated, while others are
rocky, making it hard to move... which,
naturally, also makes it difficult to fight.

It's a perfect place to train with precision,
because we can't move as we're
accustomed to.

Now, let us be on our way. I do hope this
training will be fruitful for both of us.
